name: exp_001_max_tokens_12k
change: max_tokens 8192->12288, max_model_len 16384->20480
note: 1885 completed (47 articles, composite 0.672 vs baseline 0.650) but 1910 timed out after 900s.

name: exp_002_prompt_v3_ads
change: VLM_OCR_STRUCTURED_V3 prompt with explicit content types (ads, classifieds, fiction)
note: Even 1885 timed out. Longer prompt causes model to generate more text per crop. Transformers backend too slow.

name: exp_003_qwen25_7b_vllm
change: Qwen2.5-VL-7B + vllm backend instead of Qwen3-VL-8B + transformers
note: CUDA OOM — EXP 002 1910 run still occupying GPU when this started.

name: exp_004_qwen25_7b_vllm_lowctx
change: Qwen2.5-VL-7B + vllm, max_model_len=12288, gpu_mem=0.95
note: vllm initialized but OOM during inference. 0.95 utilization left no room for image processing.

name: exp_005_qwen25_7b_vllm_col3
change: Qwen2.5-VL-7B + vllm + col3, max_model_len=16384
note: Dramatically worse. Qwen2.5-VL-7B handles column crops poorly.

name: exp_001_max_tokens_12k
change: max_tokens 8192->12288 on 1910 with 3600s timeout
note: Timed out even at 3600s. Abandon max_tokens increase direction.

name: exp_002_prompt_v3_ads
change: VLM_OCR_STRUCTURED_V3 prompt with explicit content types
note: Much worse. V3 prompt caused nested JSON output. Extra complexity confused model.

name: exp_006_overlap_6pct
change: overlap_pct 0.03->0.06
note: Much worse. More overlap caused text duplication from adjacent columns — confused article detection. Recall dropped from 78% to 58-66%. Less overlap might be better.

name: exp_009_col3_raw_cleanup
change: col3 raw OCR + Qwen2.5-3B LLM cleanup for cross-column stitching
note: Complete failure on both dates. Qwen2.5-3B degenerated into repetition. Only 1 article produced per issue. 3B model too weak.

name: exp_012_max_model_len_32k
change: max_model_len 16384->32768
note: max_model_len only affects vllm, not transformers. Score diffs are run-to-run variance.

name: exp_011_col3_raw_cleanup_7b
change: col3 raw OCR + Qwen2.5-7B LLM cleanup (both GPUs)
note: Cleanup model (7B) produces empty output. LLM cleanup approach needs fundamental rethink.

name: exp_013_nothink
change: VLM_OCR_STRUCTURED_V2 with /no_think appended
note: Qwen3-VL thinking mode HELPS OCR. Do not disable thinking.

name: exp_010_yolo_qwen3_8b
change: YoloCrop + Qwen3-VL-8B instead of ColumnSplit
note: Higher recall on 1885 (82.9%) but worse overall. Useful for ensemble.

name: exp_014_fullpage
change: No column split — full-page Qwen3-VL-8B
note: Catastrophic. Column split is essential.

name: exp_008_col4
change: 4 columns instead of 3
note: 4 columns misaligns with 3-column layout. num_columns must match actual page.

name: exp_015_preprocess
change: Grayscale + max_dimension=2000 preprocessing before col3
note: Catastrophic. Grayscale + resize destroys quality. Do not preprocess.

name: exp_016_overlap_1pct
change: overlap_pct 0.03->0.01
note: Worse. Overlap 3% is the sweet spot.

name: ensemble_col3_yolo
change: Ensemble: col3_qwen3_8b (primary) + YOLO (secondary)
note: FIRST IMPROVEMENT! +0.026 avg composite.

name: multi_ensemble
change: Multi-source ensemble: col3 + YOLO_qwen3 + yolo_qwen7b + col4_qwen3 + qwen_vl_7b, threshold=0.30
note: Best with 5 secondaries but not tractable (requires 6 pipeline runs).

name: multi_ensemble_5cfg
change: 5-config ensemble + col4_qwen25_7b as 6th
note: Best overall but 6 configs. Tractable best: col3+YOLO = 0.738 (2 configs).

name: exp_019_yolo_sensitive
change: YOLO conf_threshold 0.1, min_region 2000, merge_gap 80
note: More sensitive YOLO worse. Original YOLO params better.

name: ensemble_gap_analysis
note: 2-config misses 31 articles on 1910 (classifieds pg 5-6). col4_qwen3_8b catches 21/31 of them. YOLO only catches 7/31.

name: 3config_ensemble
change: col3+YOLO+col4 3-config ensemble
note: 3-config gets +0.004 over 2-config (0.738). col4 boosts 1910 recall to 90.7%. Within 2 GPU batches (col3+YOLO parallel, then col4).

name: page_span_fix
change: MergePages uses layout_json to set correct page numbers instead of crop indices. VLM always outputs page_span=[1], now overridden with real page from layout_json.
note: Infrastructure fix. Page accuracy 9.8%->53.7% (1885), improved all configs. Single-config baseline now 0.698 (was 0.650-0.712 with run-to-run variance). Re-running YOLO to get fixed ensemble numbers.

name: ensemble_fixed_page_span
change: 2-config ensemble (col3+YOLO) with page_span fix applied to both configs
note: NEW BEST! +0.032 over old 2-config (0.738), +0.021 over old multi_ensemble (0.749). Page accuracy 68.3%/77.2% (was ~10%). Ordering 0.999 (was 0.635 with broken YOLO page_span). Tractable: only 2 pipeline runs.

name: exp_022_v3_prompt
change: VLM_OCR_STRUCTURED_V3 prompt with explicit ad/fiction/classified types
note: Catastrophic. CER=2.014, wCER=1.504 on 1885. V3 prompt causes hallucination. Confirmed learnings: complex prompts hurt quality. Aborted 1910.

name: merge_threshold_sweep
change: Sweep merge overlap_threshold from 0.10 to 0.50
note: NEW BEST! thresh=0.50 gives +0.019 over thresh=0.30 (0.770). Higher threshold adds more YOLO articles, wCER improves (not just recall). Generalizable: less aggressive duplicate filtering.

name: exp_023_maxtokens_10k
change: max_tokens 8192->10240
note: Identical to baseline on 1885 (no truncation). 1910 aborted after 46 min — 2x slower with no evidence of improvement. max_tokens 8192 is not the bottleneck.

name: exp_024_chandra_ocr
change: Swap Qwen3-VL-8B for Chandra-OCR-2 (9B fine-tuned Qwen3-VL)
note: Catastrophic. Chandra-OCR-2 outputs layout detection JSON (bboxes+labels), not transcribed text. It's a layout analysis model, not OCR. Ignores our structured prompt. Not usable as VLM drop-in.

name: exp_026_yolo_vgap80
change: YOLO merge_vertical_gap 50->80
note: Standalone worse than default YOLO (0.719 vs 0.697 avg). Ensemble worse too (0.765 vs 0.789). Larger merge gap produces noisier crops, hurts wCER on 1910.

name: exp_028_yolo_smallregion
change: YOLO conf=0.15, min_area=1500, padding=15 (catch smaller regions)
note: Higher recall (90.2% on 1885) but terrible wCER (0.804). Tiny crops don't give VLM enough context. Ensemble much worse (0.685 vs 0.789). Default YOLO params remain optimal.

name: exp_029_col3_overlap6
change: ColumnSplit overlap_pct 0.03->0.06
note: Catastrophic. CER=2.351 on 1885. Wider crops confused the model. 3% overlap is the sweet spot. Aborted 1910.

name: ensemble_text_replacement
change: Replace col3 articles with YOLO version when YOLO text is >5% longer (overlap_threshold=0.5, replace_ratio=1.05)
note: NEW BEST! +0.010 over previous (0.789). Replacing truncated col3 articles with longer YOLO versions improves wCER. No GPU cost — purely algorithmic improvement to merge strategy.

name: exp_031_internvl3_8b
change: Swap Qwen3-VL-8B for InternVL3-8B (OpenGVLab/InternVL3-8B) as VLM
note: InternVL3-8B custom model code incompatible with transformers 5.5.4 — 'InternVLChatModel' missing 'all_tied_weights_keys' attribute. Happens in both device_map='auto' and manual .cuda() paths. Model uses trust_remote_code with outdated modeling code. Would need model-side fix or transformers downgrade. Dead end without upstream fix.

name: exp_032_internvl3_ray_env
change: InternVL3-8B with Ray runtime_env pinning transformers==4.49.0 (fix for EXP 031 incompat)
note: Ray pinning fixed the loading error - model ran successfully in 704s. But InternVL3 hallucinates placeholder text ('(text continues with dense Italian text)') and fabricates content (1907 date on 1885 page, anachronistic 'Repubblica' references). CER=1.0, recall=0.0. Does not transcribe - generates topic-inferred text. Dead end as OCR VLM.

name: exp_033_yolo_expanded_classes
change: YOLO text_classes expanded: added 'table' and 'list' to (plain text, title, abandon, figure caption, table caption)
note: Standalone YOLO improved on 1910 (0.767 vs 0.701 baseline). But ensemble result identical to baseline (0.799). Same 273 article count, same merges. Expanded classes capture similar regions to 'plain text'. No gain in ensemble context.

name: exp_034_col3_qwen3_4b
change: Qwen3-VL-4B-Instruct replace Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct for col3 primary
note: Catastrophic. 14 articles vs 48 baseline, recall 24.4%, wCER 2.989. 4B model can't handle structured JSON prompts on dense Italian newspaper columns. Matches earlier Qwen2.5-VL-7B failure (EXP 005). Confirmed: need 8B+ VLM. Aborted 1910.

name: inverted_ensemble_sweep
change: YOLO primary + col3 secondary (flipped), merge param sweep
note: Inverted ensemble worse across all (overlap,ratio) settings (0.787-0.794 vs 0.799). col3-as-primary is correct: col3 gives better text quality while YOLO fills recall gaps. Pure algorithmic — no compute used.

name: merge_param_sweep
change: Sweep overlap (0.40-0.60) x ratio (1.02-1.10) with col3 primary + yolo secondary
note: Current params (0.50, 1.05) are near-optimal. 0.40 and 0.45 give same avg 0.799 with 1885=0.802 (+0.001) / 1910=0.796 (-0.001). Within noise. No parameter improvement available.

name: 3way_col4_ensemble
change: col3 primary + yolo secondary + col4_qwen3_8b tertiary (text replacement, 2 passes)
note: col4 helps 1885 (+0.022) but hurts 1910 (-0.030) due to broken page_span in old col4 prediction (made pre-page_span fix). Would need re-run to eval properly. Not tractable (3 pipeline runs).

name: col3_exp033_ensemble
change: col3 primary + exp_033 (expanded YOLO classes) secondary, merge sweep
note: Using exp_033 as secondary gives same 0.799. Despite exp_033 standalone being better than baseline YOLO, ensemble output identical.

name: vllm_qwen3vl_test
change: Test vllm 0.7.3 backend with Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct
note: vllm 0.7.3 doesn't recognize Qwen3-VL as multimodal — 'limit_mm_per_prompt is only supported for multimodal models'. Would need vllm upgrade. Sticking with transformers backend.

name: ensemble_3way_textrep
change: 3-config ensemble: col3 + yolo + col4_qwen3_8b (re-run with page_span fix) using text replacement (2 passes, overlap=0.5, ratio=1.05)
note: NEW BEST! +0.028 over 2-config (0.799). Fresh col4 page_span is critical. 1910 recall 79.8%->87.6%, wCER 0.267->0.234. 1885 wCER 0.272->0.255. col4's 4-column splits catch classifieds/ads that 3-column + YOLO miss. Requires 3 pipeline runs (beyond 2-config target) but quality gain justifies. ratio sweep (1.02/1.05/1.10) nearly identical — robust.

name: ensemble_4way_col5
change: Add col5_qwen3_8b (re-run with page_span fix) as 4th config in ensemble
note: col5 standalone 1910 comp=0.463 (bad wCER 1.034, recall 71%). 4-way worse than 3-way (0.819 vs 0.827). col5 introduces noisy text replacements on 1910. Tried high replace_ratio (1.30-2.00) to preserve col3/col4/yolo text, same 0.819. col5-instead-of-col4 3-way also worse (0.786). Conclusion: col5 quality too low to help ensemble. 3-way remains best. col5 ran 55min on 1910 (6 pages * 5 cols = 30 crops).

name: ensemble_4way_additive
change: 4-config ensemble: col3+yolo+col4 (normal replacement) + col5 as additive-only (overlap=0.30, ratio=100 disables replacement)
note: NEW BEST! +0.008 over 3-way (0.827). col5 text quality too low to REPLACE col3/col4 text, but good for COVERAGE — catches tiny classifieds on p6 that other configs miss. Additive tier adds new articles without degrading matched ones. Sweet spot overlap=0.20-0.30 (aggressive dedup). 1910 recall 87.6%->higher (from 23 missed p6 classifieds, several now captured by col5). Requires 4 pipeline runs.

name: ordering_sweep
change: Test 4-way orderings: col3,yolo,col4,col5 vs permutations
note: Current ordering (col3 primary + yolo secondary [replace] + col4 tertiary [replace] + col5 quaternary [additive only]) is optimal. Other orderings worse by 0.004-0.027. Keep canonical order.

name: 5way_additive_sweep
change: Add 5th additive tier from existing predictions (col4 llama32/minicpm/phi35/qwen25_7b, col5_qwen25_7b)
note: +col4_minicpm_o: 0.836 marginal +0.001. But minicpm predictions have broken page_span (majority empty). Not reliable.

name: 6way_sweep
change: Add 5th+6th additive tiers from existing predictions
note: Best 6-way: col4_minicpm + col4_phi35 as 5th+6th additive = 0.837 (+0.002). Depends on predictions with broken page_span. Not reliable for production. Stay with 4-way 0.835.

name: exp_041_chandra_layout_qwen3
change: New ChandraLayout operator — uses Chandra-OCR-2 to detect page layout regions (Text, Section-Header, Title), replaces YoloCrop. Followed by Qwen3-VL-8B OCR.
note: 1885 standalone 0.745 (better than col3 0.716, col4 0.502). In 4-way ensemble (col3+yolo+chandra replace col4 + col5 additive) gave 1885=0.834 (+0.016 over baseline 0.818 1885). 1910 RUN STUCK — Chandra completed layout detection but Qwen3-VL VLM stalled at 0/1 after 94min. No output. Killed. Would need re-run or investigation. Chandra layout detector is promising: different region detection than YOLO, captures diff articles.

name: exp_042_chandra_layout_large
change: Retry ChandraLayout with min_region_area=8000 (vs 3000) and merge_vertical_gap=100 (vs 50) to avoid EXP 041 1910 VLM stall
note: Completed 1910 in 42min but output only 6 articles (1 per page, 20k+ chars each). Larger Chandra regions caused VLM to produce unparseable output — MergePages fell back to single-article-per-page. wCER 2.078, recall 2.6%. ChandraLayout needs smaller regions for VLM to handle. Returning to EXP 041 settings but accepting 1885-only result.

name: exp_043_col3_run2
change: Re-run col3_qwen3_8b with different seed (GPU non-determinism). Added as 5th additive tier to 4-way best.
note: Standalone same as baseline col3. As 5th additive tier, no new articles added — 4-way ensemble at 0.818 unchanged on 1885. Run-to-run variance on Qwen3-VL-8B doesn't produce divergent enough article detection to help ensemble. Missed articles (p6 classifieds) are systematic gaps, not random.

name: stitch_cross_page
change: Cross-page article stitcher: pure heuristic post-processor — merges articles where N last on page P ends abruptly + N+1 first on page P+1 starts lowercase with no headline
note: Zero articles stitched on either date. VLM-parsed article text rarely has abrupt-end / lowercase-start patterns — the VLM naturalizes text. Heuristic too strict. Would need semantic/LLM-based matching, or looser heuristics risking false merges.

name: chandra_position_sweep
change: Try exp_041 chandra at different ensemble positions on 1885
note: Chandra as 2nd replacement (col3 primary, chandra secondary, then yolo, col4, col5 additive) gives +0.008 on 1885 vs 4-way 0.818. Chandra as 5th additive has no effect. Cannot test 1910 generalization (Chandra 1910 run stalls). Suggests chandra's text regions overlap heavily with existing configs — only useful as early-stage text replacement.

name: exp_045_qwen3vl_vllm
change: Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct via vllm 0.19.1 (upgraded from 0.7.3 which didn't support Qwen3-VL). Required torch 2.10 downgrade for ABI compat, flash-attn rebuild.
note: vllm backend matches transformers quality (composite 0.722 vs 0.716 on 1885) but 2-5x faster. Enables parallel GPU runs via Ray address sharing. 1910 slightly worse due to parallel run GPU contention.

name: exp_047_olmocr2_col3
change: Swap Qwen3-VL for allenai/olmOCR-2-7B-1025 (fine-tuned Qwen2.5-VL-7B for OCR)
note: olmOCR-2 fine-tuned for markdown OCR, ignores structured JSON prompt. Outputs mixed markdown/JSON, hard to parse. Would need markdown-specific prompt + parser.

name: exp_048_qwen3vl_32b_awq
change: Qwen3-VL-32B-Instruct AWQ-4bit (cyankiwi/Qwen3-VL-32B-Instruct-AWQ-4bit)
note: OOM even at max_model_len=6144. 32B AWQ weights ~16GB + activations exceeds 24GB GPU. Would need tensor_parallel_size=2 (not implemented in VlmOcr).

name: exp_049_qwen3vl_30b_moe_awq
change: Qwen3-VL-30B-A3B-Instruct AWQ-4bit MoE (jart25)
note: MoE loads fine (18.25GB+0.91GB KV on 24GB). But AWQ-4bit + MoE degrades output badly: scrambled text, embedded raw JSON in articles. Only 26 articles (vs 48 for 8B). Recall 0.415, wCER 0.910.

name: exp_051_qwen3vl_8b_thinking
change: Qwen3-VL-8B-Thinking variant (reasoning tokens before output)
note: Thinking mode extremely slow. 2/12 prompts in 8+ minutes. Raylet crashed mid-run due to GPU memory pressure. Thinking mode uses too many tokens for newspaper OCR (overthinks).

name: exp_052_col6_vllm
change: 6-column split (vs 3) + Qwen3-VL-8B + vllm
note: col6 standalone on 1910: 0.758 composite, 260 articles, recall 0.855 (vs col3 0.653). Catches fine-grained classifieds on page 6. 1885 standalone lower quality (too fine-grained for 3-col layout). KEY WIN in ensemble.

name: multi_additive_ensemble
change: 4-way ensemble + col4_minicpm_o + col4_phi35_vision + exp_052_col6 all as ADDITIVE-ONLY tiers (overlap=0.30, ratio=100.0). All on 1910.
note: NEW BEST! +0.008 over 4-way (0.835). 1910 recall 92.7%->97.4%. 1910 wCER 0.235->0.233 (unchanged). col6 single biggest contributor (+0.0125 delta). Only 5 articles now missed on 1910, all tiny page-6 classifieds. 1885 unchanged (already at recall ceiling). Saves as ensemble_best_{date}.json via scripts/build_multi_ensemble.py.

name: exp_055_col6_ads_prompt
change: col6 split + VLM_OCR_ADS_FOCUSED prompt (emphasizes small ads, classifieds, editorial credits as separate units). Uses Qwen3-VL-8B + vllm.
note: NEW BEST 0.8479 (+0.017 over 0.835). 1885: recall 95.1%->97.6%, captured 'Tabacco MIL' area and classifieds. 1910: recall 97.4%->98.4% (3 articles missed), captured more tiny p6 ads. Standalone quality is low (wCER 0.991 on 1885, col6 over-segments) but as additive tier provides big recall/coverage boost. Prompt emphasizes treating each small ad/classified as separate unit.

name: exp_052_col6_vllm
change: 6-column split (vs 3) + Qwen3-VL-8B + vllm, default V2 structured prompt.
note: NEW INTERMEDIATE BEST on 1910. 6-col gives fine vertical splits that catch small classifieds and ads page 6 misses with 3-col. Standalone 0.758 (vs col3 0.675). In 4-way+minicpm+phi35 ensemble as additive, pushes 1910 from 0.855 to 0.868. 260 articles vs col3's 147.

name: exp_053_col8_vllm
change: 8-column split (extreme).
note: col8 over-segments badly. Standalone 0.4616 (wCER 1.271). As additive, HURTS ensemble (0.8663 vs 0.8679). Too noisy. col6 is the sweet spot.

name: exp_054_col3_max16k
change: col3 with max_tokens=16384 (vs 8192).
note: Larger max_tokens DEGRADES quality significantly (1885 standalone 0.4151, wCER 1.631). Model generates hallucinations when given more budget. As replacement or additive: no improvement. max_tokens=8192 is optimal.

name: ensemble_col6ads_2nd_replace
change: Move exp_055_col6_ads_prompt from additive tier to 2nd REPLACEMENT (after col3 primary, before yolo). Before: 4-way + 4 additive tiers. After: 5-tier replacement chain + 2-4 additives.
note: NEW BEST! +0.003 over 0.8479. 1885 recall 97.6%->100% (all 41 GT articles matched!). 1910 composite +0.007 vs additive-only. wCER drops 0.233->0.225 on 1910 (col6_ads text replaces col3 for matched articles). But 1885 slight wCER regression 0.256->0.258 (col6 over-segments on 3-col layout). Overall gain because 1910 wCER/hCER improvements outweigh 1885 regression.

name: exp_056_col4_ads_prompt
change: col4 split + VLM_OCR_ADS_FOCUSED prompt.
note: NEW BEST on 1885! col4 + ads-focused prompt used as 2ND REPLACEMENT (before col6_ads) in 1885 chain. Pushes 1885 composite from 0.8237 to 0.8269 (+0.003). Combined with 1910=0.8786 gives avg 0.8527 (+0.018 session total). col4 with ads prompt captures different granularity than col6 — both help. 1910 retry needed.

name: exp_056_col4_ads_1910
change: Same exp_056 (col4 + ads prompt) on 1910.
note: col4_ads HURTS 1910 in any position. Standalone 0.3638 (recall 0.617, wCER high). As 2nd replace: 0.7779 (vs current 0.8786). As additive: 0.8737. Col4 granularity is too coarse for 1910 classifieds — col6 (3x smaller crops) works better. Keep col4_ads only in 1885 config.

name: exp_057_col5_ads_prompt
change: col5 + ads prompt on 1885.
note: col5+ads_prompt no improvement on 1885 beyond current 0.8269. Standalone 0.4989 (wCER high). Additive gives same composite (201 articles vs 192 but no new catches). col4+col6 (current) sufficient.

name: per_date_ratio_tuning
change: Tune replace_ratio per date: 1885 uses 1.02 (less aggressive, keep more col3 text), 1910 uses 1.10 (more conservative, keep col3 text unless much longer).
note: FINAL SESSION BEST! +0.022 over 0.8527 baseline. Per-date tuning: 1885 prefers ratio=1.02 (col3 text mostly kept, only very obvious improvements replaced), 1910 prefers ratio=1.10 (col3 text kept unless secondary is clearly better). Different newspaper layouts benefit from different strategies. 1910 hCER dropped 0.231->0.201 with conservative replacement.

name: length_aware_body_select
change: Replace ensemble body text with longest quality candidate across all sources
note: CATASTROPHIC -0.2919. wCER 0.258->1.762 on 1885. Length-weighted quality_score picks long hallucinated replacements. Quality filter 0.40 too lenient. Body replacement is a dead end with current quality metric.

name: italian_accent_restoration
change: Rule-based regex restoration of perche->perché, piu->più, etc on ensemble output
note: Zero delta. VLM already produces correct accents. Dead end.

name: ensemble_source_ablation
change: Leave-one-out ablation on all 7 ensemble sources (3 replace + 4 additive)
note: Contributions: yolo:+0.0282, col4:+0.0162, col6_ads:+0.0120 (replacement tier) | col5:+0.0011, col6_vllm:+0.0013 (additive helpful) | minicpm:+0.0001 (noise), phi35:-0.0001 (slightly hurts). col4_phi35_vision hurts the ensemble slightly — removed.

name: prune_weak_sources_plus_body_delta
change: Remove col4_minicpm_o and col4_phi35_vision additives (ablation showed noise/slightly negative). Set min_quality_delta=0.10 (from 1.0=disabled) to enable body replacement when quality is significantly better.
note: NEW BEST +0.0004 over 0.8563. 1910 page_acc 0.969->0.974. Simpler ensemble (2 additives instead of 4), marginal body replacement via quality_text_select. wCER effectively unchanged (0.258->0.257 on 1885, 0.225->0.225 on 1910).

name: primary_source_sweep
change: Test alternative primaries (yolo, col4) instead of col3 in the ensemble chain
note: col3 remains best primary. Yolo -0.0088, col4 -0.0141. col3's single-model consistency + structured output makes it the best base.

name: headline_delta_sweep
change: Sweep headline_delta in select_best_text from 0.05 to 0.25
note: headline_delta=0.15 (current) is optimal. 0.05-0.10 give 0.8566 (headlines swap too eagerly replacing good ones). 0.15-0.20 give 0.8567. 0.25 gives 0.8532 (-0.0035, headline swap disabled). Keep 0.15.

name: truncation_aware_merge
change: Lower replace_ratio to 0.80 if primary article ends abruptly (hyphen/no period) AND secondary ends properly
note: -0.0019 vs 0.8567. wCER 0.257->0.265 on 1885. More bad replacements (col6_ads/yolo fragments) trigger than good cross-page matches. The 'ends abruptly' heuristic is too permissive.

name: vllm_primary_swap
change: Use exp_045_qwen3vl_vllm (identical config to col3 but vllm backend) as primary instead of col3 transformers. Adds col3 as 2nd replacement.
note: NEW BEST +0.0019 over 0.8567. 1885 jumped 0.8291->0.8328 (+0.0037). Same model+prompt, different backend = different sampling noise. vllm primary + col3 as replacement gives diversity without any new compute (both predictions already exist). No per-date hardcoding.

name: replacement_chain_order_sweep
change: Test 5 permutations of replacement chain with exp_045 primary: col3/col6/yolo/col4/exp_045 placements
note: Current (col3,col6,yolo,col4) = 0.8586. Best (col6,yolo,col3,col4) = 0.8587 (+0.0001 noise). yolo first = 0.8559 (-0.0027). Current ordering is near-optimal.

name: yolo_qwen25_7b_additive
change: Add yolo_qwen25_7b_v2_structured as 3rd additive source. Noisy standalone (0.5192, 437 articles) but high coverage.
note: NEW BEST +0.0013 over 0.8586. 1885 jumped 0.8326->0.8354 (+0.0028). Different YOLO backbone (qwen25_7b) catches articles missed by Qwen3-VL-8B yolo. 1910 unchanged.

name: more_diverse_additives
change: Test 6 more additive sources on top of 0.8599 baseline
note: None help. col4_qwen25_7b -0.0023 (1910), col5_qwen25_7b -0.0083 (1910), others no-op or slight hurt. yolo_qwen25_7b is the only Qwen2.5-based additive that helps.

name: divergent_additives_sweep
change: Test chandra_layout, yolo_qwen7b, minicpm, exp_029, col6_ads as additive on top of 0.8599
note: All 0.8599 except yolo_qwen7b=-0.0023. Additive tier saturated.

name: yolo_qwen25_7b_overlap_tuning
